title: 烟囱别墅之谜
source_file: data\raw\detectiveqa\novel_data_en\142-烟囱别墅之谜-阿加莎克里斯蒂.txt
summary:
After searching the pockets of the deceased Giuseppe, Anthony discovers a scrap of paper reading, "Eleven forty-five, Thursday, Chimney House." Virginia Rue notes that she is scheduled to visit Chimney House that night, though she mentions her cousin, George Romex, has expressed disapproval of the visit. To confuse potential conspirators, Anthony suggests Virginia proceed with her plans while he manages the situation.

To facilitate their plan, Virginia sends her maid, Alice, away on a false errand. Anthony selects a large suitcase from the basement to dispose of Giuseppe's body. He instructs Virginia to take her luggage and the suitcase to Paddington Station, where she is to drop a luggage ticket for him to retrieve. During this exchange, Virginia reacts with surprise when Anthony mentions his friend Jimmy McGregor, suggesting she knows him.

Anthony retrieves the suitcase, places the body inside, and drives to the outskirts of London. He obscures his car's license plate with mud, leaves the body by a roadside bend, and hides a gun in a tree crevice. He then stores the suitcase in a cloakroom at Paddington Station before driving to Chimney House.

Anthony arrives at Chimney House at 11:30 PM and scales the wall. At 11:45 PM, he hears a gunshot from inside the house. After investigating the locked windows, he observes a light flicker briefly in a second-floor room before the building returns to darkness. The following morning, Inspector Bagshaw receives a phone call from "Your Lordship" that leaves him visibly affected.
